title: dupatya plantaginoides
intro: Dupatya plantaginoides is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family and commonly known as the Vietnamese mint or Vietnamese coriander. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dupatya plantaginoides include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to make teas, topical creams, and aromatherapy products.
